nodes.label: Relation engine for knowledge graph relationships.
Manage knowledge graph relations stored in SQLite.      Usage:         engine =
Load relation types from wiki.md schema, falling back to defaults.
Return the currently loaded relation types.
Create relations and entity_aliases tables if they don't exist.
Get list of existing wiki page names.
Find best fuzzy match among candidates.
Resolve entity name to canonical form.                  Resolution order:
Add an alias mapping for an entity.                  Args:             alias: Al
Get all aliases for a canonical entity name.                  Args:
Add a single relation. Skip if duplicate exists.          Args:             sour
Batch add relations.          Args:             relations: List of dicts with ke
Get all relations for a concept.          Args:             concept: Concept nam
Find shortest path between two concepts.          Args:             source: Star
Get the original context for a relation.
Find contradictory relations between same source/target pairs.
Find concepts in relations that have no corresponding wiki page.
Build a NetworkX graph from relations.
